Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 6th, 2009 (Wide) by Warner Bros., released as He's Just Not That Into You
Video Release: June 2nd, 2009 by New Line Home Video, released as He's Just Not That Into You
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content and brief strong language
Running Time: 129 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Scene in End Credits, Voiceover/Narration
